candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header only, not the reported total.
Only a component of current assets, not the full total.

candidates.row_label: Working Capital excluding Other Current Assets & Liabilities
candidates.why: Derived metric, not total current assets.
Wrong category.
Component of non-current assets.
Component of non-current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label.
Equivalent total cash label; acceptable fallback.
Broader than pure cash equivalents; includes short-term investments, so less preferred.
Broader than pure cash equivalents; includes short-term investments.
Not cash.
Cash flow item, not cash balance.
Cash flow item, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Dividends Paid & Common Stock Buyback - Net
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Preferred the pure cash-and-cash-equivalents label; included the identical total variant as fallback because labels can vary over time.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Section header only, not the reported total.

Only a component of current liabilities.
Wrong category.
Non-current component, not current liabilities total.
Non-current component, not current liabilities total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Exact clean total for short-term debt/current portion of LTD; preferred for STD.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Excludes lease liabilities and is a component of STD, but not a full total if any separate short-term borrowings exist.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Contains lease liabilities, which baseline STD excludes.
Lease liabilities are excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Used the explicit total current debt line from the candidate list. Although it appears to include capitalized leases, there is no cleaner full total for all short-term debt components excluding leases; the lease-excluding line is only one component.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Includes non-current amounts, so less precise for taxes payable/current liabilities.
Deferred/non-current tax liability, not taxes payable.

candidates.row_label: Deferred Tax & Investment Tax Credits - Long-Term
candidates.why: Deferred/non-current, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Essentially same PPE total here, acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Right of Use Tangible Assets & Capital Leases - Net
candidates.why: Useful alternative if excluding ROU/lease assets is preferred, but less standard than reported PPE total.
Component/subset rather than total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Net
candidates.why: ROU assets only, not total PPE.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Preferred the reported total/net PPE line; included near-identical fallback label for possible label variation over time.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

Asset category only, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Net
candidates.why: Asset category only, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Net - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental asset category only, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net operating cash flow / OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.
Section header/method descriptor, not the numeric net cash flow line.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
